pages.title: Exporter Not Pulling
pages.text: $(bold)Common causes$(): $(li)Adjacent machine doesn't have items to extract $(li)Adjacent machine doesn't expose `IItemHandler` capability $(li)Exporter buffer is full (PreFab isn't extracting fast enough)$(br2)$(bold)Debug$(): $(li)Check machine output (is it producing items?) $(li)Try placing chest next to Exporter (test if Exporter pulls from chest) $(li)Check Exporter buffer (is it full? Items stuck?)
